beginner.title: Prepositions of Time: At, In, On
beginner.content:
📌 At, in, on: Giới từ chỉ thời gian
ATINON
Thời gian cụ thể trong ngày:
• at 3 o’clock
• at 10.30 am
• at noon
• at midnight
• at dinnertime
• at bedtime
• at sunrise
• at sunset
• at the moment		Tháng, mùa, năm, thập kỷ, thế kỷ, giai đoạn dài:
• in May
• in the summer
• in 1990
• in the 1990s
• in the 20th century
• in the Ice Age
• in the past/future		Ngày và ngày cụ thể:
• on Sunday
• on Tuesday mornings
• on 6 March
• on 25 December 2010
• on Christmas Day
• on Independence Day
• on my birthday
• on New Year’s Eve
Các cụm từ thông dụng:
• at the weekend
• at Christmas/Easter
• at the same time
• at present/at the moment		Các phần trong ngày:
• in the morning
• in the afternoon
• in the evening
⚠️ Last, next, every và this
Khi dùng last, next, every, this, chúng ta KHÔNG dùng at, in, on.
• I went to London last June. ✅ (KHÔNG dùng in last June)
• He’s coming back next Tuesday. ✅ (KHÔNG dùng on next Tuesday)
• I go home every Easter. ✅ (KHÔNG dùng at every Easter)
• We’ll call you this evening. ✅ (KHÔNG dùng in this evening)
I wake up at 7 o'clock in the morning.Tôi thức dậy lúc 7 giờ sáng.
My birthday is on July 15th.Sinh nhật của tôi là vào ngày 15 tháng 7.
We usually go on holiday in summer.Chúng tôi thường đi nghỉ vào mùa hè.

exercises.q: I usually read books ___ the evening.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với các buổi trong ngày (trừ night)
Dùng 'at' với các dịp lễ (không có 'Day')

exercises.q: I will call you ___ the afternoon.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với các buổi trong ngày

exercises.q: What do you do ___ your birthday?
He arrived ___ the same time as me.
The party is ___ New Year's Eve.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'on' với ngày lễ cụ thể

exercises.q: What do you do ___ the weekend?
She will call you ___ the morning.
We often go out ___ the evening.
He will visit us ___ Christmas Day.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'on' với ngày lễ cụ thể

reorder.words: I wake up at 7 o'clock
My birthday is in May
We go to school on weekdays
I usually read books in the evening
The party is on Saturday night
She was born in 2000
See you at Christmas
He works at the moment
We have a holiday in summer
The meeting is at 10:30 am
They got married on October 25th
I will call you in the afternoon
The store closes at midnight
We usually travel at the weekend
She started her job in 2023
I saw him on Monday morning
What do you do on your birthday
The concert is in December
He arrived at the same time as me
We don't work at night

passage.text: My routine starts early {{1}} the morning. I wake up {{2}} 6 o'clock {{3}} weekdays. {{4}} the weekend, I usually sleep longer. My classes start {{5}} 8:30 am {{6}} Monday to Friday. {{7}} the afternoon, I have lunch {{8}} 12:30 pm. {{9}} the evening, I study or relax. {{10}} night, I go to bed around 10 pm.

Last year, {{1}} July, I went on holiday. We left {{2}} the 15th {{3}} the month. We arrived {{4}} a beautiful island {{5}} the evening. {{6}} the first day, we swam {{7}} the sea. {{8}} night, we watched the stars. {{9}} the next morning, we went hiking. We had a great time {{10}} our trip.

My friend's birthday is {{1}} December 24th. We always celebrate {{2}} Christmas Eve. {{3}} the morning, we open presents. {{4}} the afternoon, we have a big lunch. {{5}} the evening, we play games {{6}} midnight. {{7}} that time, we sing 'Happy Birthday'. {{8}} the past, we used to have bigger parties. But {{9}} present, we prefer small gatherings. We always have fun {{10}} her special day.

The store opens {{1}} 9 am {{2}} weekdays. {{3}} Saturdays, it opens {{4}} 10 am. It closes {{5}} 6 pm {{6}} the evening. {{7}} Sundays, it is closed all day. {{8}} Christmas Day, it also closes. {{9}} the future, they plan to open longer. {{10}} present, these are the opening hours.

I have an important exam {{1}} next week. I need to study hard {{2}} the next few days. I will study {{3}} the morning, {{4}} the afternoon, and {{5}} night. I will take a break {{6}} lunchtime. {{7}} the weekend, I will review everything. I hope to pass {{8}} the first attempt. {{9}} the end of the exam, I will feel relieved. I will celebrate {{10}} my friends after it's all over.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một ngày bình thường của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ thời gian (at, in, on).
writing_prompts.example: I usually wake up at 6:30 in the morning on weekdays. I have breakfast at 7 o'clock. My classes start at 8:00. In the afternoon, I have lunch at 12:00. I finish school at 4:00. In the evening, I do my homework. At night, I go to bed around 10:00. On weekends, my routine is different.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một sự kiện đặc biệt trong năm của bạn (sinh nhật, lễ hội, kỳ nghỉ), sử dụng các giới từ chỉ thời gian.
writing_prompts.example: My favorite time of the year is in December because of Christmas. On Christmas Day, my family gathers at my grandparents' house. We open presents in the morning and have a big dinner in the afternoon. At night, we watch movies together. On New Year's Eve, we usually have a party with friends. In summer, I often go on holiday with my family.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả lịch trình học tập hoặc làm việc của bạn trong tuần, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ thời gian.
writing_prompts.example: On Monday, I have English class at 9 am. In the afternoon, I work from 1 pm to 5 pm. On Tuesday, I study at the library in the morning. On Wednesday, I have a meeting at 10 am. At the weekend, I usually relax. I don't work on Sundays. I try to finish all my tasks by Friday evening.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một kỷ niệm trong quá khứ, sửn dụng các giới từ chỉ thời gian.
writing_prompts.example: In 2010, I went to the beach for the first time. It was on my 10th birthday. At that time, I was very excited. We stayed there for a week in August. Every morning, I played in the sand. In the afternoon, we swam in the sea. At night, we watched the sunset. It was a wonderful memory from the past.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả kế hoạch của bạn cho tương lai gần, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ thời gian.
hint_words: at the end of the year
writing_prompts.example: Next month, I plan to start a new course. It will begin in two weeks. On Friday, I will register for it. At the end of the year, I hope to finish it. In the future, I want to get a better job. I will work hard every day to achieve my goals. I believe that in time, my efforts will pay off.

beginner.title: Prepositions of Place: At, In, On
beginner.content:
📌 At, in, on: Giới từ chỉ địa điểm
ATINON
Tại một điểm cụ thể:
• at the traffic light
• at the door
• at the crossroads

Đầu/cuối của một cái gì đó:
• at the top of the stairs
• at the bottom of the page
• at the end of the street

Hoạt động nhóm/sự kiện:
• at the cinema
• at a party
• at a concert

Trường học/Đại học:
• at school
• at university

Ở nhà/làm việc:
• at home
• at work

Cửa hàng, nhà hàng, quán cà phê:
• at the bakery
• at the chemist’s		Trong không gian 3D:
• in the bag
• in the classroom
• in a box

Trong lãnh thổ/khu vực có giới hạn:
• in London
• in Europe
• in the Alps
• in the world

Trong xe hơi/xe tải:
• in the car
• in a van

Trong nước:
• in the sea
• in the river
• in the swimming pool

Trong tài liệu in ấn:
• in a book
• in a picture
• in a newspaper		Trên bề mặt:
• on the table
• on the carpet
• on the roof
• on the sofa

Trên tầng:
• on the first floor
• on the fifth floor

Bên phải/trái:
• on the right
• on the left

Phương tiện giao thông công cộng:
• on the bus
• on the train
• on a plane

Truyền thông:
• on the radio
• on TV
• on the Internet
• on a website
The book is on the table.Cuốn sách ở trên bàn.
She is in the kitchen.Cô ấy đang ở trong bếp.
I will meet you at the bus stop.Tôi sẽ gặp bạn ở trạm xe buýt.

exercises.q: I will meet you ___ the bus stop.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'at' với một điểm cụ thể

exercises.q: The cat is sleeping ___ the bed.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới

exercises.q: There are many people ___ the park.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với không gian mở có giới hạn
Dùng 'at' với một điểm cụ thể (cửa)

exercises.q: The children are playing ___ the garden.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với không gian mở có giới hạn (vườn)

exercises.q: My office is ___ the second floor.
The bird is singing ___ the tree.
There is a spider ___ the ceiling.

exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với không gian 3D (nhà để xe)

exercises.q: She put the groceries ___ the fridge.

exercises.exp: Dùng 'on' với bề mặt (bàn làm việc)

exercises.q: The children are playing ___ the beach.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'on' với bãi biển (trên bề mặt)

exercises.q: My office is ___ the third floor.

exercises.exp: Dùng 'at' với địa chỉ cụ thể

exercises.q: There is a bird's nest ___ the tree.
She is waiting ___ the bus stop.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'at' với một điểm cụ thể
Dùng 'in' với không gian 3D (túi quần áo)

exercises.q: We had dinner ___ a fancy restaurant.
The children are playing ___ the garden.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với không gian mở có giới hạn

exercises.q: There is a clock ___ the wall.
The car is parked ___ the street.
The dog is sleeping ___ its bed.

exercises.exp: Dùng 'in' với tài liệu in ấn

reorder.words: The book is on the table
She is in the kitchen
I will meet you at the bus stop
The cat is sleeping under the bed
There are many people in the park
My keys are in my bag
He lives in London
The picture is on the wall
She is waiting at the door
The children are playing in the garden
My office is on the second floor
He is at work right now
The bird is singing in the tree
There is a spider on the ceiling
We had dinner at a restaurant
The car is in the garage
She put the groceries in the fridge
My phone is on the desk
He is studying at Oxford University
The children are playing on the beach

passage.text: My house is {{1}} a quiet street {{2}} the city center. There is a small garden {{3}} front of the house {{4}} many flowers. My living room is {{5}} the first floor, and the kitchen is {{6}} the ground floor. My bedroom is {{7}} the second floor. I have a desk {{8}} my bedroom {{9}} the window. My cat often sleeps {{10}} the chair {{11}} the living room.

I work {{1}} an office {{2}} the city. My office is {{3}} the third floor {{4}} a big building. I sit {{5}} a desk {{6}} the window. My computer is {{7}} the desk, and my phone is {{8}} my hand. There is a plant {{9}} the corner {{10}} the room. I usually have lunch {{11}} a cafe {{12}} the street.

My friend lives {{1}} a small village {{2}} the mountains. Her house is {{3}} the river. There are many trees {{4}} her house. She has a dog that loves to play {{5}} the garden. {{6}} the summer, they often go swimming {{7}} the lake. {{8}} the winter, they go skiing {{9}} the nearby slopes. She works {{10}} a small shop {{11}} the village square.

I went to a concert {{1}} the stadium last night. I met my friends {{2}} the entrance. We sat {{3}} the front row {{4}} the stage. The band played {{5}} the stage. There were many people {{6}} the audience. I saw my favorite singer {{7}} the TV screen. After the concert, we went to a bar {{8}} the corner {{9}} the street. We talked about the concert {{10}} a few hours {{11}} the bar.

My cat loves to hide. Sometimes she is {{1}} the sofa, sometimes {{2}} the curtains. I often find her {{3}} the bed, or {{4}} the table. She likes to sit {{5}} the window and watch the birds. When I'm working, she jumps {{6}} my lap {{7}} the desk. She also likes to sleep {{8}} my clothes {{9}} the wardrobe. It's always a surprise to find her {{10}} different places {{11}} the house.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả phòng ngủ của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí (at, in, on).
writing_prompts.example: My bedroom is on the second floor of my house. There is a big window in my room. My bed is next to the wall. On the bed, there are many pillows. My desk is by the window, and my computer is on the desk. My clothes are in the wardrobe. There is a rug on the floor. I feel very comfortable in my room.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả nơi làm việc hoặc học tập của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí (at, in, on).
writing_prompts.example: I work in a big office building in the city center. My office is on the fifth floor. I sit at a large desk by the window. My computer is on the desk, and my documents are in the drawer. I often have meetings in the meeting room. At lunchtime, I usually eat at the cafeteria on the ground floor. I enjoy working in this environment.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một địa điểm công cộng (công viên, siêu thị, nhà hàng) và những gì bạn thấy ở đó, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday, I went to the park. There were many people in the park. Some children were playing on the grass. A couple was sitting on a bench under a big tree. There was a beautiful fountain in the middle of the park. I saw a dog running next to its owner. I bought an ice cream at a small stand near the entrance. It was a lovely day in the park.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả vị trí của các đồ vật trong nhà bếp của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
writing_prompts.example: In my kitchen, the fridge is next to the oven. The microwave is on the counter. All the plates are in the cupboard above the sink. The glasses are in the cupboard next to the plates. I keep my spices in a small rack on the wall. The trash can is under the sink. I always try to keep my kitchen tidy.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một bức tranh hoặc một bức ảnh, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
writing_prompts.example: In this picture, I see a beautiful landscape. On the left, there is a tall mountain. On the right, there is a calm lake. In the foreground, there are some colorful flowers. In the background, I can see a small village. A few birds are flying above the lake. The sun is shining brightly in the sky. It's a very peaceful scene.

beginner.title: Other Prepositions of Place: Next to, Under, Between, In front of, Behind, Over
beginner.content:
📌 Các giới từ chỉ vị trí khác
Giới từÝ nghĩaVí dụ
Next to / BesideKế bên, bên cạnh• We had a picnic next to/beside the river.
• Come and sit next to/beside me.
BetweenỞ giữa (hai người/vật)• I live in a small town between Liverpool and Manchester.
• She is sleeping between her mum and dad.
In front ofỞ phía trước• John sits in front of me in class.
• You are always in front of the mirror.
BehindỞ phía sau• She is hiding behind the curtains.
• We hang our coats behind the door.
OppositeĐối diện• I live opposite the supermarket.
• I am sitting opposite him.
UnderỞ dưới• The cat is hiding under the bed.
• Why are your shoes under the table?
Above / OverỞ trên (vị trí cao hơn)• She lives in an apartment above/over the grocery store.
• There is a shelf above/over the sink.
The dog is sleeping under the tree.Con chó đang ngủ dưới gốc cây.
My house is next to the park.Nhà tôi ở cạnh công viên.
The teacher stands in front of the class.Giáo viên đứng trước lớp.

exercises.q: The cat is hiding ___ the sofa.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới
Dùng 'next to' để chỉ vị trí bên cạnh
Dùng 'in front of' để chỉ vị trí phía trước

exercises.q: The car is parked ___ the tree.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'behind' để chỉ vị trí phía sau
Dùng 'opposite' để chỉ vị trí đối diện
Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới
Dùng 'between' để chỉ vị trí ở giữa hai người/vật

exercises.q: There is a clock ___ the door.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn

exercises.q: The dog is running ___ the children.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'among' khi ở giữa nhiều người/vật

exercises.q: He put his hands ___ his pockets.
The picture is hanging ___ the fireplace.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn

exercises.q: The children are playing hide-and-seek ___ the trees.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'among' khi ở giữa nhiều người/vật

exercises.q: My car is parked ___ your car and his car.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'between' để chỉ vị trí ở giữa hai người/vật
Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn

exercises.q: He stood ___ the mirror, looking at himself.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'in front of' để chỉ vị trí phía trước

exercises.q: The remote control is ___ the cushions.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới
Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới
Dùng 'next to' để chỉ vị trí bên cạnh

exercises.q: The dog is sitting ___ its owner.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'behind' để chỉ vị trí phía sau

exercises.q: There is a bridge ___ the river.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'over' để chỉ vị trí bắc qua

exercises.q: The cat is sleeping ___ the bed.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới

exercises.q: My car is parked ___ the house.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'behind' để chỉ vị trí phía sau
Dùng 'next to' để chỉ vị trí bên cạnh
Dùng 'in front of' để chỉ vị trí phía trước
Dùng 'opposite' để chỉ vị trí đối diện

exercises.q: The ball is rolling ___ the table.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới
Dùng 'between' để chỉ vị trí ở giữa hai người

exercises.q: There is a fan ___ the bed.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn

exercises.q: The children are playing ___ the trees.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'among' khi ở giữa nhiều người/vật

exercises.q: He put the book ___ the shelf.
The plane is flying ___ the clouds.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn
Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới

exercises.q: The dog is hiding ___ the bushes.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'behind' để chỉ vị trí phía sau

exercises.q: The restaurant is ___ the bank and the post office.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'between' để chỉ vị trí ở giữa hai địa điểm
Dùng 'in front of' để chỉ vị trí phía trước
Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn
Dùng 'opposite' để chỉ vị trí đối diện

exercises.q: The remote control is ___ the cushions.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'under' để chỉ vị trí bên dưới

exercises.q: There is a mirror ___ the sink.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'above' để chỉ vị trí cao hơn

exercises.q: The cat is sitting ___ the window.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'next to' để chỉ vị trí bên cạnh

passage.text: My favorite cafe is {{1}} the library {{2}} the main street. There is a big tree {{3}} the cafe. I usually sit {{4}} the window {{5}} a small table. My friend often sits {{6}} me. The counter is {{7}} us. There are many books {{8}} the shelves {{9}} the wall. A big clock hangs {{10}} the door. I love the atmosphere {{11}} this cafe.

My dog, Max, loves to play {{1}} the garden. He often hides {{2}} the bushes {{3}} the fence. Sometimes he digs holes {{4}} the trees. When I call him, he runs {{5}} me {{6}} the house. He loves to chase the ball {{7}} the grass. After playing, he usually sleeps {{8}} his bed {{9}} the living room. He is a very happy dog {{10}} our family.

I went to a museum yesterday. It was {{1}} the city center. There were many old paintings {{2}} the walls. Some sculptures were {{3}} the middle {{4}} the room. I saw a very old map {{5}} a glass case. A guide was standing {{6}} a group of tourists {{7}} a famous statue. I walked {{8}} the exhibits {{9}} a few hours. I bought a souvenir {{10}} the gift shop {{11}} the exit.

My friend's apartment is {{1}} the third floor {{2}} a tall building. Her balcony looks out {{3}} the park. There is a small table {{4}} the balcony {{5}} two chairs. Inside, the living room is {{6}} the kitchen. Her sofa is {{7}} the TV. There are many books {{8}} the shelves {{9}} the wall. Her bedroom is {{10}} the end {{11}} the hallway.

The children were playing hide-and-seek. One child hid {{1}} the curtains. Another was {{2}} the big armchair. A third child was {{3}} the door, trying to be quiet. The seeker looked {{4}} the table, {{5}} the chairs, and {{6}} the sofa. Finally, he found one child {{7}} the bed. He then looked {{8}} the two tall bookshelves {{9}} the corner. He found the last child {{10}} the box {{11}} the cupboard.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả vị trí của các đồ vật trong phòng khách của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí khác (next to, under, between, in front of, behind, over).
writing_prompts.example: In my living room, the sofa is next to the window. The TV is in front of the sofa. There is a coffee table between the sofa and the TV. A soft rug is under the coffee table. The bookshelf is behind the sofa. I have a small plant over the bookshelf. It's a cozy place to relax.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả đường đi từ nhà bạn đến một địa điểm quen thuộc (trường học, cửa hàng), sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
writing_prompts.example: To get to the school from my house, I walk straight ahead. I pass the park on my left. Then, I turn right at the traffic light. The school is opposite the supermarket. There is a big tree in front of the school gate. My house is next to a small bakery. It takes about 10 minutes to walk there.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một bức tranh hoặc một cảnh vật, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí khác.
writing_prompts.example: In this painting, I see a beautiful landscape. There is a small river flowing between two green hills. A wooden bridge goes over the river. A few birds are flying above the clouds. Behind the mountain, the sun is setting. There is a small house next to the river. Under the bridge, some ducks are swimming. It's a very peaceful scene.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một trò chơi trốn tìm bạn đã chơi, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
writing_prompts.example: When I was a child, I loved playing hide-and-seek. I often hid behind the big curtains in the living room. Sometimes, I went under the table. My sister always hid in front of the door, which was not a good spot. My brother once hid between the two tall bookshelves. It was always fun to find them in different places around the house.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả vị trí của các cửa hàng hoặc địa điểm nổi bật trên con phố của bạn, sử dụng các giới từ chỉ vị trí.
hint_words: between the cafe and the restaurant
writing_prompts.example: On my street, there is a small bakery next to the bank. The post office is opposite the supermarket. There is a cafe between the bookshop and the restaurant. The cinema is in front of the big shopping mall. Behind the school, there is a large park. My house is next to the bus stop. It's a very convenient street with many places.
